metadata.title: Sneaky Flank Turns Into a Clean Double Kill in VALORANT Mid Fight
metadata.description:
Caught the enemies off guard with a perfect timing flank through mid. Watch how patience and sharp aim earn the double kill fast.
What’s your favorite sneaky route to take in VALORANT?

Drop a comment with your best flank play!

#valorant #shorts #gaming #fps #valorantclips
